rows.label: tev078801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Trachlo about the
leadership of the Zaruboggan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Trachlo about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Trachlo what he intends to do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0001
rows.name:
As we fulfill our calling, we Zaruboggan
obey directives from the director of
planning assigned to each area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0002
rows.name:
*fsssh* But of the Zaruboggan
who came to Mira, I am the only
one who holds such a position.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0003
rows.name:
As a result, I ended up being the sole Zaruboggan
performing leadership duties such as negotiating
with Director General Chausson. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0004
rows.name:
But in the end, I remain a mere
spokesman fulfilling the duty
assigned to me by Golbogga. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0005
rows.name:
The only true leader of the Zaruboggan is
Golbogga, who drowned our homeworld in
voltant and birthed our people. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0008
rows.name:
I have begun negotiating with humans
throughout NLA in order to secure a
steady supply of voltant. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0009
rows.name:
The most promising prospects are here in the industrial
district. *fsssh* Unlike the Ma-non, humans use
tremendous amounts of chemicals in manufacturing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Whether they're producing Dolls or consumer
goods, large amounts of high-quality voltant
are always a byproduct. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0011
rows.name:
I understand that since these chemicals can be
quite dangerous to you, distributing them to
others is a matter of no small concern. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0012
rows.name:
But I intend to prove that we Zaruboggan can
be trusted. *fsssh* In this way, I hope to
secure the voltant we need to survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0013
rows.name:
Liza has told us a great deal about
the work she does here. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0014
rows.name:
These "waste-processing units" of
hers sound like a dream come true
for the Zaruboggan. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0015
rows.name:
If we were given access to such installations,
I know that there would be no shortage of
Zaruboggan eager to work there. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0016
rows.name:
To offer such a spectacular opportunity
is astounding. This Liza is like
Golbogga in human form! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0035
rows.name:
We may never be able to return
to Bedun, the planet that we were
destined to purify. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0036
rows.name:
In that case, I would consider this
world to be our new Bedun, and strive
to devoltanize it completely. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0037
rows.name:
With its ferocious indigens and
scattered Growth loyalists, it is
a world of many hazards. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0038
rows.name:
But we are Zaruboggan—children born of Golbogga—
and no matter the setbacks, we will fulfill the
calling that has been bestowed upon us. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0039
rows.name:
I pray that you will continue
to share your great power
with us, friends. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Trachlo about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Trachlo about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0017
rows.name:
Liza has told us a great deal
about the work she does at the
waste-processing units. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0018
rows.name:
The amount of voltant stored there is
like a dream come true to us. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0019
rows.name:
If we were given access to such installations,
I know that there would be no shortage of
Zaruboggan eager to work there. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0020
rows.name:
I would like to further explore this possibility.
This could be the first step to a new friendship
between humankind and the Zaruboggan. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Trachlo about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0021
rows.name:
I would like to have Orleron
succeed me in my role as
director of planning. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0022
rows.name:
I am teaching him what he needs to know
about the true meaning of devoltanization
and the story of Golbogga. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0023
rows.name:
Recently, he has seemed distracted with
thoughts of that human woman. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0024
rows.name:
But that may be for the best. *fsssh* The Zaruboggan
who would lead us in NLA must understand as much
about humans as he does his own people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_SEL4021
rows.name: Ask Trachlo about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0025
rows.name:
Orleron let all of us share in
devoltanizing the voltant he
brought back from Cauldros. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0026
rows.name:
When we began speaking of Orleron,
I realized that we envied him in
some corner of our hearts. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0027
rows.name:
He was born with the same form as the rest of
us, but he never let that hold him back from
interacting boldly with the humans. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0028
rows.name:
At times, he even seems to forget his calling and
simply conducts himself as he pleases. *fsssh* That
is a rare trait, and we have shunned him for it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0029
rows.name:
But we must no longer marginalize this vital member
of our community. *fsssh* Instead, we should utilize
our individual strengths to find success together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0030
rows.name:
To be frank, I had never been confident
that alien creatures like us could
find a home in NLA. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0031
rows.name:
But thanks to Liza, numerous Zaruboggan
now have known the paradise of
waste-processing units. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0032
rows.name:
She truly is Golbogga in human form. *fsssh*
How I yearn to worship at her feet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0033
rows.name:
*fsssh* And yet, she always
seems tired from overwork.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078801_MSG0034
rows.name:
Perhaps we should make her an offering of the finest
quality voltant as a token of thanks. *fsssh*
Devoltanizing that would surely reinvigorate her![ST:wait ]
